/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto -Wl,-O2 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--allow-shlib-undefined -Wl,-rpath,/home/hviswan/anaconda3/envs/MCGINO/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/hviswan/anaconda3/envs/MCGINO/lib -L/home/hviswan/anaconda3/envs/MCGINO/lib -shared  -o zombie.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/zombie.dir/demo/demo.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/hviswan/Documents/Neural-Monte-Carlo-Fluid-Simulation/bindings/zombie_3d_surface/build/gnu_10.5_cxx11_64_release gnu_10.5_cxx11_64_release/libtbb.so.12.16
